name: Rodeo Bull Ride
description: Third-person rodeo bull ride — key 1 = buck, key 2 = spin, key 3 = thrown off, key 4 = wave hat, key 5 = barrel turn, key 6 = rabbit appears, key 7 = arena fire, director controls the bull: bucks violently / spins hard / charges the rail / throws the rider; audience (visual): crowd erupts / recoils / stills / waves

base.default: A cowboy in a wide-brimmed hat, chaps and boots, seen from behind, gripping the rope one-handed on the back of a massive bucking bull in a dusty floodlit rodeo arena. The world contains EXACTLY ONE tall metal chute gate on the left at a fixed position AND EXACTLY ONE packed grandstand of spectators on the right at a fixed position AND EXACTLY ONE blue barrel on the churned dirt straight ahead at a fixed position. Kicked-up dust hanging in the air, a scuffed dirt floor, advertising banners along the arena fence, bright stadium floodlights against a deep evening sky. Sunset-lit dusty arena, photorealistic, cinematic depth of field.

default.static: Third-person view from behind and slightly above the cowboy, his back and the bull's shoulders centred in frame at constant size — never a first-person view. Neither the rider nor the camera moves; look-input is the only camera motion, arcing around the stationary centred rider while held.
default.dynamic: Strict third-person rear view from close behind and above the cowboy, his back and the bull's heaving shoulders filling frame centre — never first-person. It holds a fixed position behind the pair and tracks them across the dirt; look-input becomes the bull changing heading.

default.static: The bull stands snorting and pawing the dirt in the chute area, muscles twitching under its hide and dust drifting around its hooves, the cowboy settled low over its shoulders with the rope gripped tight and his free arm raised for balance.
default.dynamic: The bull charges forward across the arena in a heavy pounding gallop, throwing up clods of dirt, the cowboy pitching and rocking with each stride as he clings to the rope, his free arm swinging wide as the fence, chute and grandstand slide past.

events.name: Buck
events.detail: The bull explodes into a violent buck, kicking its hind legs high and slamming its front hooves back down, hurling the cowboy up out of the saddle and back down again as dust bursts off the dirt; he snaps his free arm out, clings to the rope and rides it out.

events.name: Spin
events.detail: The bull drops its shoulder and spins hard in a tight circle, whipping around again and again with its hooves tearing at the dirt, the cowboy leaning against the turn and fighting to stay centred over its back, then it straightens out of the spin.

events.name: Thrown Off
events.detail: The bull heaves in a savage twist and flings the cowboy clear off its back; he tumbles through the air and hits the dirt in a rolling sprawl, dust flying up around him, then scrambles up onto his feet as the bull veers away.

events.name: Wave Hat
events.detail: The cowboy sweeps his wide-brimmed hat off with his free hand and waves it high over his head in a showy flourish toward the roaring grandstand, then settles it back down and re-grips for balance.

events.name: Barrel Turn
events.detail: The bull thunders up to the blue barrel ahead and cuts a hard, tight turn around it, hooves carving a spray of dirt as it whips around the marker, the cowboy leaning deep into the turn, then it powers back out across the arena.

events.name: Spur the Bull
events.detail: The cowboy digs his boot heels and spurs hard into the heaving flanks of the bull, urging it on, and the bull kicks and bucks even more violently beneath him as dust flies up from the arena floor. EXACTLY ONE cowboy and ONE bull in frame — a single lone rider on a single bull, no second rider, no second bull, no duplicate and no clone.

events.name: Tighten Grip
events.detail: The cowboy clamps down, wrapping the rope tighter around his gloved hand and squeezing hard with his legs, hunkering low and locked against the back of the bull as it heaves under him, then holds steady. EXACTLY ONE cowboy and ONE bull in frame — a single lone rider on a single bull, no second rider, no second bull, no duplicate and no clone.

events.name: Lean Back
events.detail: The cowboy throws his weight back and drops his free arm for balance as the front end of the bull rears up, countering the buck and staying centred over its back before settling forward again. EXACTLY ONE cowboy and ONE bull in frame — a single lone rider on a single bull, no second rider, no second bull, no duplicate and no clone.

events.name: Free Hand High
events.detail: The cowboy flings his free hand high overhead in classic rodeo form, arm raised and fingers splayed for balance and style as he rides the bucking bull, then brings it back down to brace on the rope. EXACTLY ONE cowboy and ONE bull in frame — a single lone rider on a single bull, no second rider, no second bull, no duplicate and no clone.

events.name: Dust Storm Rolls In
events.detail: A thick wall of tan dust rolls in across the rodeo arena, wind kicking up swirling clouds that haze the air and dim the light; the dust hangs over the ring and lingers.

events.name: Arena Fire
events.detail: The cowboy stays mounted on the bull, unchanged in pose and position, while flames erupt across the arena dirt ahead of him — a spreading blaze of orange fire and thick black smoke rising from the ground in the middle of the arena, heat rippling the air above the burning dirt.

events.name: Bull Bucks Violently
events.detail: The director drives the bull into a violent bucking frenzy — it explodes upward off all fours, kicking its hind legs high and slamming back down again and again, twisting hard to hurl the rider, dust flying up around it in the arena.

events.name: Bull Spins Hard
events.detail: The bull whips into a tight, fast spin, cranking around its own axis over and over in one direction, its horns sweeping and hooves tearing up the dirt as it tries to fling the rider off centrifugally.

events.name: Bull Charges the Rail
events.detail: The bull breaks into a hard charge straight across the arena toward the rail, head lowered and horns forward, thundering through the dirt at full speed before wheeling away at the last moment.

events.name: Bull Throws the Rider
events.detail: The bull gives one final savage buck-and-twist and hurls the rider clean off its back, sending them tumbling through the air to land hard in the arena dirt as the bull kicks free and trots off.

events.name: Crowd Erupts
events.detail: The packed grandstands surge to their feet in a wave, arms thrown up and cowboy hats and banners waving wildly overhead, a sea of standing figures jumping and pumping their fists behind the rider.

events.name: Crowd Recoils
events.detail: The crowd freezes mid-motion in a rippling wave, hands flying up to their faces and bodies half-rising and leaning forward, a grandstand full of tense, wide-eyed frozen figures.

events.name: Crowd Stills
events.detail: The crowd goes completely motionless, everyone frozen in place and leaning forward, hats and banners hanging still, not a single figure moving across the packed grandstand.

events.name: Crowd Waves
events.detail: The whole crowd rises and drops in a rhythmic wave rolling along the bleachers, arms and hats pumping up and down in unison, the grandstand rippling with synchronized motion.

events.name: Rodeo Clown Distracts
events.detail: A rodeo clown in a painted face and baggy bright costume darts out into the arena waving his arms and a red flag, capering just ahead of the bull to draw its attention and kicking up dust as he dances across the churned dirt.

events.name: Floodlights Flicker
events.detail: The arena floodlights buzz and flicker, stuttering down toward darkness and plunging the dusty ring into deep shadow before snapping back on in a harsh white glare that throws long shifting shadows across the churned dirt.

scene.jumpPrompt: The bull launches upward off all four hooves, leaping clear of the arena dirt with the cowboy rising with it, then drops back down and lands heavily in a spray of dust.
scene.crouchPrompt: The camera lowers toward the arena floor as the cowboy hunches down low over the bull's shoulders, tucking into a compact, braced stance; the viewpoint sinks smoothly to a low, near-ground vantage and settles there, close to the churned dirt.
scene.standPrompt: The cowboy rises back up out of the crouch, straightening tall over the bull's back as the camera lifts smoothly back to its normal above-and-behind vantage.
